series_metadata.series_description: Application renewals, notification of changes and supporting documentation for all license types, including but not limited to exam results, Bureau of criminal investigations reports, any and all documents and correspondence relative to agents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years after inactive, then shred/erase ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after inactive, then shred/erase, Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
